name: Zomato
description: Food delivery, restaurant discovery, and quick commerce (Blinkit) platform serving millions across India
pros: India-listed public company (NSE/BSE) with growing Indian institutional ownership
Blinkit quick commerce integration for 10-minute grocery delivery
Restaurant discovery with genuine user reviews and photos
Zomato Gold membership with free delivery and dining discounts
cons: FIIs still hold 42% of shares — significant foreign institutional ownership
Platform commission makes restaurant food 20-40% more expensive
Aggressive dark kitchen strategy raises food quality concerns
Delivery partner treatment and pay have been controversial
userComplaints: Food quality from cloud kitchens is inconsistent and often poor
Hidden charges pile up: delivery fee, packaging fee, platform fee
Zomato Gold benefits keep getting reduced while price stays the same
